---
title: "Martin Petr"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/bodkan
    - text: Research
      url: https://scholar.google.cz/citations?user=h9-xAdAAAAAJ
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:contact@bodkan.net"
    - text: Twitter
      url: https://twitter.com/dr_bodkan

---

I am a researcher at the University of Copenhagen, Denmark.

I work on methods for spatial data analysis and simulation, with the aim to answer new kinds of questions about the evolutionary history of humans and other species across space and time.

I also teach and mentor students. An important underlying theme of my work is the design of intuitive computational interfaces for both novice researchers and experts alike.
